raw_response:
[
  {
    "Step_id": 1,
    "Target": "box_1",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "The darker box (box_1) is on top of box_2 and its left and right faces are unobstructed. Both arms can approach the mid-height of box_1 from the sides without colliding with the tabletop or the lower box. Sufficient overhead clearance exists to lift the box once grasped.",
    "Postcondition": "Both end-effectors firmly sandwich box_1 from the sides and lift it a few centimeters above box_2; the robot is now holding the darker box in mid-air, fully detached from the stack."
  }
]

parsed_json.Precondition: The darker box (box_1) is on top of box_2 and its left and right faces are unobstructed. Both arms can approach the mid-height of box_1 from the sides without colliding with the tabletop or the lower box. Sufficient overhead clearance exists to lift the box once grasped.
parsed_json.Postcondition: Both end-effectors firmly sandwich box_1 from the sides and lift it a few centimeters above box_2; the robot is now holding the darker box in mid-air, fully detached from the stack.
